name: adv-partial-bail
notes: Partial execution via bail:1 (constant across both runs). Baseline is all-green (complete, 3/3). The current run turns the first test red, so vitest bails and the remaining two record as not_run (partial, 1/3). An observed pass->fail is a real new_fail that forces regressed even under partial, while the two unobserved tests are neither repaired nor claimed unchanged.
